outages.boundary: N 20TH  ST TO N 24TH  ST AND E CAMELBACK  RD TO E CAMPBELL  AVE
outages.comments: An underground power cable has failed. SRP crews are working to restore power.

outages.boundary: S 15TH  AVE TO S CENTRAL  AVE AND W ELWOOD  ST TO W ROESER  RD
outages.comments: An SRP maintenance crew is performing critical maintenance work to repair or upgrade equipment. Power will be restored as quickly as possible.
